prompt: Let's make something HUGE! Use the size button to make your object as big as it can go.
Can you make it enormous? Make it as big as possible!
feedback: WOW — that's enormous! The biggest it can be!
Huge! Look how big that is!
failureFeedback: Keep going — make it even bigger!
Try cycling size all the way up!

prompt: Now make it TINY — as small as it can go!
Can you shrink it? Make it as small as possible.
feedback: So tiny! Can you barely see it?
failureFeedback: Keep going — make it even smaller!

prompt: Now make it somewhere in the middle — not too big, not too small.
Can you find a medium size?
feedback: Just right! Not too big, not too small.
Medium! You know big, medium, and small!
